column1: # BSE-only symbols — stocks that only list on BSE
# Default for every other symbol is NSE: prefix on TradingView
# vast majority of liquid Indian swing-tradeable names are dual-listed and
# NSE is the higher-volume venue. Only BSE-exclusive names need to be here
# so TradingView resolves the chart correctly.
# Add a symbol here when you click a chart link and TradingView shows
# "Symbol not found" — that's the signal it's BSE-exclusive.
# Format: one symbol per line. Comments start with #.
